column1: ________ the storm, over ten thousand people took part in the marathon.
________ I wrote myself a note to remind me, I still forgot to call George tonight.
Most Egyptologists believe that the Sphinx is about 4000 years old. Some geologists, ________, argue that it must be at least 14,000 years old.
________ having taken two aspirin, I had such a bad headache that I had to go home.
I've never seen a UFO. ________, that doesn't mean that I don't believe in them.
There are still two million people unemployed ________ the fact that we're in the middle of an economic boom.
________ no European country carries out capital punishment, it is widely used throughout the United States.
Technology has benefited humankind enormously. There are drawbacks with our reliance on technology, ________ .
I couldn't find my keys ________ searching for them everywhere.
